subcodes.first_line: Say: O Lord, my God! All praise be unto Thee for having shown me Thy Beauty, honored me with Thy presence, and caused me to hearken unto Thy call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل اللهم یا الهی لک الحمد بما اریتنی جمالک و شرفتنی بلقائک و اسمعتنی ندآئک و
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @living waters; water of life
